summary: Excellent front‑of‑house capture of a classic Spring ’85 Dead show, praised for its pristine sound and nostalgic performance.
review: Both reviewers give the recording five stars, lauding the high‑quality FOB (front‑of‑house) source with virtually no edits and crystal‑clear mix. While they don’t name specific songs, they describe the concert as a standout of the Spring‑85 tour, making it a must‑listen for fans.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently five‑star reviews focus on superb recording quality and enthusiastic endorsement of the show; limited musical detail keeps rating just shy of perfect.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house (FOB) capture with virtually no edits; clear, balanced mix that listeners describe as wonderful and A+ quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlight the concert as a standout of the Spring‑85 run but give no specific song or set‑by‑set commentary.
